description: Following a large concert, the venue's general manager needs a report summarizing key performance metrics.

nodes.task_description: Gather final attendance data from the access control system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the final count of scanned tickets.

nodes.task_description: Gather total gross sales data from the food and beverage and merchandise systems.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the final sales figures.

nodes.task_description: Gather a summary of all security and medical incidents from their respective logs.
Compile all data into a standardized post-event report template.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a comprehensive report summarizing all key metrics.
